name: storytelling-media-mcp
description: MCP tools for Nano Banana image generation, Veo video generation, and FFmpeg stitching.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images and videos through local MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Storytelling Media MCP provides Codex with Nano Banana image generation, Veo video generation, and FFmpeg video stitching tools through a local stdio MCP server.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Storytelling Media MCP tools and movie production pipeline skill when I ask for AI image generation, Veo video generation, video stitching, or staged movie development.
